meaning: adj.不能说的,不应说出的,避讳的
examples: Or perhaps there is something more ineffable at work.
On the one hand, miasms; on the other, an ineffable perfume.
In that mystery lurks the world's ineffable potential for good.
Something as ineffable as where you focus your attention can make your whole brain work differently.
What Milton's readers learn is to treat words as approximate signs of the ineffable.
